name: Moroccan Carrot and Orange Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Section the oranges (about 2 cups).
2. Cut the onions into 2-inch lengths (about 2 cups).
3. Soak the currants in water for 10 minutes, then drain them.
4. Add all the ingredients to a bowl and toss well.
5. Refrigerate for at least 1/2 hour before serving.
